data.body: 25aa claimed (top of stack). Plan: extract 2 PURE decision helpers into small dedicated modules for tractable, noise-free mutation shards — compaction fold predicate (is_foldable; behavioral tests from 4001+1fdc) and push-policy classifier (normalize_push_mode; a263) — add focused direct unit tests, add the 2 small modules to [tool.mutmut] only_mutate + test selection, install+run mutmut on the shards, record mapped scores in docs/mutation-testing.md and update the scope caveat. DESCOPE (per AC allowance) sync-branch-selection + lock stale-owner/reclamation (no behavioral tests added here) with a documented follow-up note. Delegating.
